case_title: BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA INC. VS GARCIA VICTOR A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,504.47 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA VICTOR A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
